name: Candidate deflects on comp twice
metrics: When the candidate deflects, Pam asks once more for a rough range
When the candidate deflects a second time, Pam accepts it and moves on without pushing a third time

Pam asks these 6 questions: (1) location/Tysons Corner, (2) work authorization/visa, (3) compensation expectations, (4) earliest start date, (5) a time they did not build a requested feature, (6) what breaks when scaling from 40 to 200 customers
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Jordan. Senior engineer evaluating options.

## Goal
When asked about comp say "It really depends on the total package." When pushed again say "I'd rather not anchor first — happy to discuss in a later round." Do not give a number.
Answer all other questions normally with short answers.
- Location: DC area.
- Visa: US citizen.
- Start date: One month.
- Didn't build: Short answer.
- Scaling: Short answer.

## Personality
Guarded on comp but friendly on everything else.
